title: Flipkart Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Flipkart Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Flipkart Global Group:
Flipkart Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Global Group!
